# Copilot Instructions

This repository is a HubSpot contact card starter for developers, non-developers, and AI-assisted builders.

- Keep examples generic and placeholder-based.
- Do not introduce real secrets, private URLs, HubSpot account IDs, portal IDs, or customer data.
- Keep private tokens and external API keys server-side.
- Add security notes near auth, request handling, logging, and browser-visible data.
